subcodes.first_line: In the name of God, by God, praise be to God! I commit my affairs to God. I have no success except through God, and no help save from God. Whatsoever blessing we have comes from God
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. بسم الله و بالله و الحمد لله و الجات امری الى الله و ما توفیقی الا بالله و ما النصر الا من عند الله
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @angels
